headline: Ralph Lauren Announces the Next Phase of Its Global Citizenship & Sustainability Strategy: Timeless by Design 2030
summary: NEW YORK, March 24, 2026--Ralph Lauren Corporation (NYSE: RL) today announced the next phase of its Global Citizenship & Sustainability (GC&S) strategy, Timeless by Design 2030. The strategy builds on the Company’s meaningful progress over the past several years to enhance the resilience of the teams, communities, partners and natural resources essential to its business.

summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: After a volatile start to the week, futures are trading flat on Tuesday.
